reviews.comment:
Los playeros parece de la YPF que está sobre la Av. Colón de Mar del Plata te atienden "de favor", sin muchas ganas... La verdad, nunca me pasó en otras YPF que atienden muy correcta y atentamente.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants seem to be from the YPF station on Av. Colón in Mar del Plata, and they serve you "as a favor," without much enthusiasm... Honestly, this has never happened to me at other YPF stations, where service is very correct and attentive.

reviews.comment:
Le daria 0 estrellas, esta semana tuve la mala experiencia, voy y le digo al playero si no me ponia 3000 pesos de super, el tipo dejo la manguera y me lleno el tanque que eran casi 6 mil pesos.....un error lo puede tener cualquiera pero despues la actitud del playero estuvo mal porque me dijo: ¿cuanto tenes? O sea el error fue de el no mio......tengan cuidado si van a esta estacion a cargar parece que hay playeros dormidos que no saben usar el surtidor, nunca en mi vida me sucedio algo asi ya que para algo los surtidores tienen los botones para programar la carga.....que agradezca el playero y el dueño de la estacion que no arme mas quilombo....un DESASTRE

(Translated by Google)
I'd give it 0 stars. I had a terrible experience this week. I went to the gas station and asked the attendant if he could put in 3,000 pesos worth of premium fuel. The guy put down the pump and filled my tank, which cost almost 6,000 pesos. Anyone can make a mistake, but the attendant's attitude was wrong because he asked me, "How much do you have?" The mistake was his, not mine. Be careful if you go to this station to fill up. It seems like some of the attendants are asleep at the wheel and don't know how to use the pump. I've never had anything like this happen to me, since pumps have buttons to program the fill-up for a reason. The attendant and the station owner should be grateful that I didn't cause any more trouble. It was a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtbnI3RHZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención y no hay que perder tiempo haciendo fila para cargar combustible.
Cuenta con una confitería y cafetería. Baños limpios.
Cuenta con servicio asesoramiento para socios y servicio mecánico.
Posee varios pisos destinados para cochera/garaje.
Lo recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and no need to wait in line for fuel.
It has a confectionery and coffee shop. Clean restrooms.
It offers member services and mechanical support.
It has several floors of parking. I recommend it.

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, aunque a veces se complica por el tránsito la entrada o salida del lugar:Colón  y Santa Fé. Posibilidad de alquiler de cocheras. 5% descuento en combustibles y otros siendo socio de ACA. Ofrecen agua caliente gratis para el termo. Hay servicio para comer algo rápido o tomar algún cafecito. Baños cuidados y limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, although sometimes traffic makes getting in and out difficult: Colón and Santa Fe. Parking is available for rent. ACA members get a 5% discount on fuel and other items. They offer free hot water for your thermos. There's a place to grab a quick bite or a coffee. The restrooms are well-maintained and clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMteUp2c1F3EAE
